recommended_actions.title: Pause failing ECS service until its image or task definition is fixed
recommended_actions.why: test_def-service-vnwns50w keeps retrying failed task launches (5 recent failure events) while desiredCount remains > 0.
recommended_actions.action: Set desiredCount to 0 or disable the service until the container image and startup path are healthy.

recommended_actions.title: Pause failing ECS service until its image or task definition is fixed
recommended_actions.why: test_def-service-64zgxsih keeps retrying failed task launches (5 recent failure events) while desiredCount remains > 0.
recommended_actions.action: Set desiredCount to 0 or disable the service until the container image and startup path are healthy.

recommended_actions.title: Move non-production ECS service to Fargate Spot when interruption is acceptable
recommended_actions.why: test_def-service-vnwns50w looks like a non-production workload and currently uses standard Fargate capacity.
recommended_actions.action: Switch the capacity provider strategy to FARGATE_SPOT for interrupt-tolerant environments.

recommended_actions.title: Review ECS task size for non-production workload
recommended_actions.why: test_def-service-vnwns50w uses a task definition sized at 1024 CPU units and 3072 MiB memory.
recommended_actions.action: Validate actual CPU and memory usage and reduce the Fargate task size if headroom is consistently high.

recommended_actions.title: Move non-production ECS service to Fargate Spot when interruption is acceptable
recommended_actions.why: test_def-service-64zgxsih looks like a non-production workload and currently uses standard Fargate capacity.
recommended_actions.action: Switch the capacity provider strategy to FARGATE_SPOT for interrupt-tolerant environments.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: Disabled event source mapping may indicate a paused or unused workflow
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Confirm whether this flow is still needed. Remove the mapping or retire the upstream queue/stream if the workflow is gone.

unused_or_waste_findings.title: Enabled event source mapping is failing to process
unused_or_waste_findings.why: PROBLEM: Lambda failed to assume your function execution role. Please check if the role trust Lambda service principal, and make sure it does not require setting source identity to be assumed.
unused_or_waste_findings.recommended_action: Fix the execution role or disable the mapping until the downstream path is healthy.
